_purpose: Metadata-only descriptor for HF Hub download tracking. This repository is the MLX adapter CODE for stepfun-ai/Step-3.7-Flash on Apple Silicon — Python source under mlx_vlm/models/step3p7/ and mlx_lm/models/step3p7.py, plus chat_template patch and extract_vision_weights.py reproducer script. It does NOT contain model weights. To use: download stepfun-ai/Step-3.7-Flash separately, run scripts/extract_vision_weights.py to prepare the vision shard with NHWC Conv2d transpose, then drop the adapter into your mlx_vlm install. See README.md.
license: Apache-2.0 (adapter code) / Step Robotics license (upstream weights — see https://huggingface.co/stepfun-ai/Step-3.7-Flash)
